name: Les Machines de l'île – Permanent Installation
venue_name: Les Machines de l'île (Île de Nantes)
description: Permanent exhibition including the Grand Éléphant (a 12m-tall mechanical elephant carrying 49 passengers), the Carrousel des Mondes Marins (a 3-tier marine carousel), and the Galerie des Machines. Created by François Delarozière and Pierre Orefice.

name: La Princesse (giant spider)
description: A 15-metre mechanical spider named La Princesse walked through Liverpool's streets. Produced by Artichoke for Liverpool European Capital of Culture 2008. Designed by François Delarozière / La Machine.

name: Long Ma – Dragon-Horse (Saga des Géants)
description: Long Ma – a 12-metre fire-breathing dragon-horse machine – first performed in Nantes as part of Les Machines de l'île spectacles.

name: Long Ma & Spider – The Guardian's Dream (François Delarozière)
description: Long Ma (dragon-horse) and Kumo (a giant spider) performed in Beijing as part of the 50th anniversary of France-China diplomatic relations.

name: La Machine – Kumo Spider
description: La Machine performed a giant spider spectacle in Yokohama as part of the city's founding anniversary celebrations.

name: La Machine – Le Héron Arbre / Heron Tree Project
description: The Heron Tree is a 35-metre mechanical heron atop a 12-metre tree structure, a new permanent landmark under development in Nantes.

name: La Machine – Saga des Géants 2023
venue_name: Île de Nantes / Nantes city centre
description: La Saga des Géants 2023 – a major street spectacle featuring giant machines in Nantes city centre.
